description_long: This is a plush, round, green stuffed toy with a soft, fuzzy exterior and a cartoonish pig face. The toy features two small, upright ears on top of its head and a large, protruding snout with two black nostrils. Its eyes are wide and circular, with black pupils and gray outlines, giving it a slightly surprised or vacant expression. The eyebrows are simple, dark stitched lines above the eyes, adding to its animated look. The back of the toy is plain green with no additional features or markings. The overall appearance is playful and whimsical, resembling a character from a popular mobile game.
description: A round, green plush pig toy with a large snout, cartoon eyes, and small ears, featuring a soft, fuzzy texture.
description_view_0: Side view showing the round green body, one ear, and the protruding snout with one eye visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both eyes, the large snout with nostrils, both ears, and the stitched eyebrows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the round body, one ear, and the snout from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain green back and both ears, with no facial features visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral with wide, open eyes and slightly arched stitched eyebrows, giving a mildly surprised or vacant look. The mouth is not visible, and the snout is prominent.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy is in a relaxed, rounded posture with no visible limbs, and the head and body form a single, continuous shape.
